data.pattern: install-v2 keeps legacy post-install prompts after pipeline GuidanceStage
data.impact: same semantic-search prompt/enabling can be shown or executed twice after one successful install

data.summary: Store-era mutators still have unprotected config read-modify-write paths and counter/state writes that can fail open to duplicate stable_ids or lost registry updates.

data.title: Store aliases are unconstrained but used as filesystem path segments
data.note: Alias should be a single safe path segment before use in by-alias symlink paths.

data.summary: Detected duplicated checked-in client hook copies and a retired install.ts implementation still referenced by tests while production registry uses install-v2.
Store-era recall and section delivery independently recompute the read-set store corpus, causing repeated full store walks and file reads per fab_recall.

data.pattern: Ink TUI renders status/progress through hard-coded color, Unicode glyphs, and animated Braille spinners without a text-only/reduced-motion mode

data.summary: Review/archival compliance gaps cluster around persisted human/session context: session digests cache raw user transcript snippets without redaction/TTL, and fab_review mutation events do not carry invoker session provenance.
